assignees: []

## Summary

Describe the documentation issue.

---

## Location

Where is the issue located?

- README
- Engineering Handbook
- ADR
- RFC
- API Documentation
- Deployment Guide
- Examples
- Other

---

## Problem

- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Outdated documentation
- [ ] Typographical error
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Poor explanation
- [ ] Missing example
- [ ] Other

---

## Suggested Improvement

Describe how the documentation could be improved.

---

## Additional Context

Include screenshots, links, or references if helpful.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing documentation issues.
- [ ] I identified the affected document(s).
- [ ] I provided a suggested improvement.
